289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

cycles.name: Configuration Schemas & Error DTOs

deliverables.description: Extend presentation_config.py with FormattingConfig, NoteGroupConfig, GlobalNotesConfig, failures, and formatting fields.
Define ToolErrorOutput with params dict and error DTO subclasses in mcp_server/schemas/error_outputs.py.

cycles.exit_criteria: Pydantic presentation configuration model correctly loads formatting, global templates, and failures. Custom error DTO models compile and enforce extra='forbid' and frozen=True.

cycles.name: Note Presentation Engine & Loop

deliverables.description: Implement Note(key, params) dataclass and deprecate legacy note classes in operation_notes.py.
Implement SafeNoneFormatter subclass of string.Formatter to safely format None values.
Implement TextPresenter.present_notes(tool_name, notes) with note grouping and markdown formatting.

cycles.exit_criteria: Unit tests verify note rendering loop and safe formatter.

cycles.name: server.py Integration Bridge & Error Interception

deliverables.description: Intercept validation, enforcement, and execution exceptions in handle_call_tool in server.py, mapping to error DTOs and caching/formatting them.
Decouple NoteContext from direct rendering and route collected notes to TextPresenter.present_notes in server.py.

cycles.exit_criteria: Validation, enforcement, and execution exceptions are caught, DTO-wrapped, cached, and formatted using templates.

cycles.name: Drift Validator Extension & Blacklist

deliverables.description: Extend validate_presentation_alignment to validate failure templates and note placeholders.
Enforce generic parameter name blacklist (message, msg, text, txt, error_message, error, err) in templates.

cycles.exit_criteria: Server fails to boot with ConfigError if templates violate backdoor or blacklist rules.

cycles.name: Code & Note Production Migration

deliverables.description: Migrate note production and exceptions in managers and adapters (including git_manager, enforcement_runner, qa_manager, artifact_manager, deliverable_checker, phase_state_engine, and git/github/filesystem adapters) and tools to use generic Note events and exception codes.
Remove Python transition advisory notes in cycle_tools.py and tools.

cycles.exit_criteria: All managers/adapters migrated. Server compiles and E2E integration tests pass using the compatibility mapper.

cycles.name: Test Suite Refactoring, Clean Break & Dead Code Cleanup

deliverables.description: Remove compatibility mapper and legacy note subclasses from operation_notes.py.
Refactor all unit and integration test suites to assert presenter-formatted markdown blocks.
Identify and delete all dead/obsolete code in both production and test suites (including legacy to_message() methods and unused note fixtures/helpers/assertions).

cycles.exit_criteria: All legacy note subclasses and to_message() methods are deleted. All unit and integration test assertions are updated to verify presenter output. All dead/obsolete code in both production and test suites (including legacy helper methods and assertions) is completely removed. Full test suite passes.
